items.title: Refactor history selector UI and error messaging
items.description: Reduce duplicated terminal selector logic, replace magic numbers/strings with named constants, and improve `p --log` rendering and error messages while keeping debug detail available.

items.title: make lint killed on this host
items.description: `make lint` is killed with SIGKILL (exit 9) on this host. Investigate resource usage or adjust Makefile/lint invocation so `make lint` is reliable.
